changes.description: Added checksum validation logic that: (1) clones stored checksum, (2) reserializes meta without checksum field, (3) computes BLAKE3 hash, (4) compares and returns error on mismatch with warning to stderr
Comprehensive test covering: valid checksum read success, manual checksum corruption, read failure verification, error message validation

patterns_discovered.context: Checksum validation requires re-serializing meta with checksum field set to None to compute expected hash, ensuring stored and computed values match exactly
Checksum mismatch logs to stderr (eprintln!) for observability while returning anyhow::anyhow! error for caller handling
Test creates valid state, reads successfully, corrupts state, reads and verifies failure with error message inspection

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Checksum field must be cloned before mutation
gotchas_discovered.explanation: Storing checksum in variable before setting meta.checksum = None prevents ownership conflicts during reserialize

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: BLAKE3 hash output requires explicit string conversion
gotchas_discovered.explanation: blake3::hash() returns a Hash object; must call .to_hex().to_string() to match stored hex string format (64 chars)
Validation occurs early (line 635-655) so corrupted metadata is rejected before any field type coercion attempts

discoveries.approach_outcome: SUCCESS - Checksum validation fully implemented with: (1) deterministic BLAKE3 hash computation on canonical JSON representation, (2) detailed error context (expected vs computed), (3) fallback behavior for missing checksum field, (4) defensive test that exercises both happy path and corruption detection

recommendations.recommendation: Add checksum computation to write_meta() path to ensure all meta.json files written by bop have checksums
recommendations.rationale: Current implementation validates on read but does not guarantee all writes compute checksums; asymmetric coverage

recommendations.recommendation: Document BLAKE3 hash format in meta.json schema (64-character lowercase hex string)
recommendations.rationale: Future maintainers need to know exact format and how to manually verify checksums

recommendations.recommendation: Consider adding metrics/counters for checksum mismatch incidents
recommendations.rationale: Would help detect corruption patterns in production (e.g., specific cards, time windows, FS races)

recommendations.recommendation: Add cross-volume test case (APFS COW scenarios) to verify checksum is stable across clones
recommendations.rationale: bop uses cp -c COW cloning; should verify checksum computation is deterministic post-clone
